Poll.title: Poll Option
Poll.description: A single poll option that users can vote on

id.description: Unique id of the poll document

content.description: The poll question or proposal content

createdBy.description: The visitorId of the creator, or system

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the poll option was created

votes.description: List of visitorIds who voted for this poll

polls/{pollId}.description: Collection of all options available for polling
